statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(s:KMSKey) WHERE s.anonymous_access IS NOT NULL WITH s LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE REMOVE s.anonymous_access, s.anonymous_actions return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
